meaning: n.[牌]间张(同一花色中的两张在级别上相差两级的牌)
examples: Their features are novel in design, reasonable in structure, convenient in main tenace.
The instant spade return into dummy's tenace wouldn't normally seem a sound or promising play.
After two rounds of trumps you just switch to hearts, and when East ruffs he has to lead into the club tenace.
